title: Fix button background colors — light fill, native border (v0.4.149)

requirements.summary: Update 'Upload Files' button with light blue filled background and native border styling
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Upload Files' button has a light blue filled background (subtle tint, not vivid)
No custom blue border, outline, or ring is applied — the border looks like a standard native button border
Text and icon on the button are dark-colored for contrast against the light blue background
The button does not have any colored border in dark mode either

file_operations.description: Update the 'Upload Files' button styling: apply bg-blue-100 (light mode) and dark:bg-blue-900/30 (dark mode) for a light blue filled background; remove any custom blue border, ring, or outline classes (e.g., border-blue-500, ring-blue-500, outline-blue-500); ensure text and icon use dark colors (e.g., text-blue-900 dark:text-blue-100) for proper contrast against the light background; verify the button retains its native/default border appearance without colored borders in either theme.

requirements.summary: Update 'New Folder' and 'Upload Folder' buttons with light yellow filled background and native border styling
acceptanceCriteria: The 'New Folder' and 'Upload Folder' buttons have a light yellow filled background (subtle tint, not vivid)
No custom yellow border, outline, or ring is applied — the border looks like a standard native button border
Text and icon on the buttons are dark-colored for contrast against the light yellow background
The buttons do not have any colored border in dark mode either

file_operations.description: Update the 'New Folder' and 'Upload Folder' button styling: apply bg-yellow-100 (light mode) and dark:bg-yellow-900/30 (dark mode) for a light yellow filled background; remove any custom yellow border, ring, or outline classes (e.g., border-yellow-500, ring-yellow-500, outline-yellow-500); ensure text and icon use dark colors (e.g., text-yellow-900 dark:text-yellow-100) for proper contrast against the light background; verify the buttons retain their native/default border appearance without colored borders in either theme.
Change the APP_VERSION constant from '0.4.148' to '0.4.149'.
